question: What is the name of the director who is in the "Dracula" program?
sql: SELECT director.Name FROM director JOIN program ON director.Director_ID = program.Director_ID WHERE program.Title = 'Dracula'

back_translation.intent: 查找与特定节目相关的导演信息

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题询问的是'Dracula'节目对应的导演姓名，SQL反向翻译描述准确反映了这一意图，涉及的表、列和过滤条件均匹配。
